variants: Violeta Miralles is a prominent figure in the field of Industrial Design, currently residing in Robingale Park. Her innovative thinking led her to create the Petal Flux Oscillator, a device that has garnered attention in design circles. For her contributions, Violeta was honored with the Arcane Compass Distinction, recognizing her unique impact on the industry. In addition to her professional achievements, she is an active member of the Evergold Beadsmiths Union, where she engages with fellow creators and artisans.
